proposed_change: For any refund-category response, you MUST call search_policy and cite at least one POL-REFUND-XXX policy ID — even when explaining timing, eligibility windows, or general refund rules. A vague reference to "the refund policy" is not a citation.
diff_summary: Require POL-REFUND-XXX citation on every refund-category response, including general explanations.
original_text: Whenever you reference a policy, cite it by its Policy ID (format: `POL-XXX-NNN`, e.g. `POL-REFUND-001`). A general phrase like "our refund policy" is NOT a citation.
proposed_text: Whenever you reference a policy, cite it by its Policy ID (format: `POL-XXX-NNN`, e.g. `POL-REFUND-001`). A general phrase like "our refund policy" is NOT a citation. For any refund-category response, you MUST call search_policy and cite at least one POL-REFUND-XXX policy ID — even when explaining timing, eligibility windows, or general refund rules.
